description_long: This hotel features a grand, multi-tiered structure with symmetrical terraces and lush landscaping, reminiscent of ancient Persian or Mughal garden architecture. The central building rises above a series of cascading platforms, each adorned with greenery, planters, and water features, creating a sense of luxury and tranquility. The entrance is marked by a prominent gate and a wide staircase leading up to the main level, flanked by decorative walls and pools. The exterior is finished in light stone or stucco, with blue-tiled water channels and abundant vegetation providing visual contrast. The uppermost level includes a central pavilion with arched windows and floral accents, suggesting opulent guest accommodations. The overall design emphasizes harmony with nature, formal symmetry, and a sense of retreat from the urban environment.
description: A grand, multi-tiered hotel with lush gardens, cascading terraces, and water features, inspired by classical Persian or Mughal architecture. The structure is finished in light stone with blue-tiled pools and abundant greenery.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance gate, wide staircase, and symmetrical terraces with lush landscaping and water features.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the layered terraces, garden beds, and the depth of the cascading platforms, with the entrance wall visible to the left.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the upper pavilion, arched windows, and the continuation of the garden terraces, with water features and planters visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the symmetry of the terraces, the entrance gate, and the extensive landscaping along the perimeter.
